좋아. Lua 트리거 작성한다.

현재 필요한 Lua 트리거 기능:

1. **랜덤 VIP 카드 자동 저장** — AI 출력에서 `###VIP_CARD_START###`~`###VIP_CARD_END###` 마커 감지 → 사이 텍스트를 `$random_vip_card` 변수에 저장
2. **변수 자동 업데이트** — AI가 서사 중에 변수를 직접 변경할 수 없으니까, 핵심 변수 변경을 Lua가 보조할 수 있어

근데 여기서 질문과 설계 결정이 필요해:

---

## 설계 질문

**Q1. 변수 업데이트를 누가 해?**

현재 설계에서 `$hp`, `$mp`, `$climax`, `$sens_*` 등의 변수 변경은 **AI가 서사 중에 `{{setvar}}`나 `{{addvar}}`를 직접 출력**하는 방식이야? 아니면 **Lua가 AI 출력을 분석해서 자동으로 변경**하는 방식?

| 방식 | 장점 | 단점 |
|------|------|------|
| **A: AI가 직접** — AI 출력에 `{{setvar::$hp::75}}` 포함 | 간단. Lua 최소화 | AI가 CBS를 정확히 출력하지 못할 수 있음. 서사에 `{{setvar}}` 텍스트가 노출될 수 있음 |
| **B: AI가 마커 출력 → Lua가 파싱** — AI가 `【HP:75 MP:40 CLX:80】` 같은 마커 출력 → Lua가 읽어서 변수 설정 | AI 부담 적음. 마커만 정확하면 됨 | Lua 복잡해짐. 마커 형식 엄격해야 함 |
| **C: AI 신뢰** — AI한테 서사만 시키고, 변수는 AI가 트래커 출력할 때 "이 값이 맞다"고 선언 → Lua 개입 안 함 | 가장 간단 | 변수 정확도 낮을 수 있음 |

**내 의견:** 현실적으로 **A + 부분적 B** 조합이 최선이야.
- 기본 변수(`$hp`, `$mp`, `$climax` 등)는 AI가 `{{setvar}}` CBS를 출력하게 지시 → CBS가 자동으로 파싱됨 (RisuAI가 AI 출력의 CBS를 처리하니까)
- 랜덤 VIP 카드만 Lua 트리거로 처리 (마커 기반)
- 이러면 Lua가 가벼워지고, AI는 이미 CBS 출력에 익숙함

**이 방식이면 Lua는 사실상 VIP 카드 저장 기능 하나만 하면 돼.**

근데 확인할 게 있어 — **RisuAI에서 AI 출력에 포함된 `{{setvar::$hp::75}}`가 실제로 파싱되어 변수가 바뀌는 게 맞지?** CBS 가이드를 보면 "chat context에서 runVar가 true일 때" 작동한다고 되어있는데, AI 출력도 이에 해당하는지.

만약 AI 출력의 CBS가 파싱 안 되면, 방식 B(Lua 마커 파싱)로 전환해야 해. 이건 네가 확인해줘야 해.

---

**Q2. 그래서 네 답변:**

| # | 질문 | 대답 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | AI 출력에 `{{setvar}}`를 넣게 해서 변수를 관리할래? | ? |
| 2 | 아니면 AI가 마커를 출력하고 Lua가 전부 파싱할래? | ? |
| 3 | RisuAI에서 AI 출력의 CBS가 파싱되는지 확인한 적 있어? | ? |

이거 확정되면 바로 Lua 코드 작성할게. 방향에 따라 코드가 완전히 달라져서 먼저 물어보는 거야.
1, 네 의견대로 A+부분적 B로 가자. AI출력에 setvar가 파싱되는걸로 알고있어, 첨부 가이드 다시한번 확인해봐. 못찾겠으면 risuai 정보를 웹에서 다시 검색해봐

CBS 가이드를 다시 확인했어. 핵심 부분:

> `{{setvar::A::B}}` — Sets chat variable A to value B. **Only executes when runVar is true**. Chat context only.

그리고 웹 검색 결과도 확인했는데, **AI 출력에 포함된 CBS가 자동 파싱되는지는 불확실해.** 일반적으로 CBS는 **로어북/시스템 프롬프트 단계에서 파싱**되지, AI가 생성한 응답 텍스트에서 자동 실행되지는 않을 가능성이 높아.

이건 중요한 문제야. 두 가지 시나리오를 대비해서 설계할게:

---

## 최종 설계 결정

**변수 관리는 전부 AI 서사 신뢰 + Lua 보조 방식으로 간다.**

| 변수 종류 | 관리 방식 |
|----------|----------|
| `$hp`, `$mp`, `$climax`, `$sens_*` 등 게임 변수 | AI가 트래커 출력할 때 **현재 값을 직접 명시.** 로어북의 `{{setdefaultvar}}`가 초기값 설정. 이후 AI가 서사적으로 값을 추적하며, 트래커에 수치를 써넣음 |
| `$random_vip_card` | **Lua 트리거**가 마커 감지 → 자동 저장 |
| `$session_turn` | **Lua 트리거**가 세션 중 유저 메시지마다 자동 +1 |
| `$current_vip`, `$phase` 등 상태 전환 | **Lua 트리거**가 특정 패턴 감지 시 자동 변경 |

이러면 AI는 서사에만 집중하고, 변수의 기계적 정확성은 Lua가 담당해.

---

Lua 트리거를 기능별로 나눠서 작성한다. RisuAI에서는 트리거를 여러 개 만들 수 있으니까, 역할별로 분리하는 게 관리하기 좋아.

### 트리거 1: VIP 카드 자동 저장

```lua name=trigger_vip_card_save.lua
--[[
  Trigger Name: VIP Card Auto-Save
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Detects ###VIP_CARD_START### and ###VIP_CARD_END### markers
  in AI output, extracts the card text, and saves it to $random_vip_card
  chat variable.
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    local lastMsg = getCharacterLastMessage(triggerId)
    if not lastMsg then return end
    
    local startMarker = "###VIP_CARD_START###"
    local endMarker = "###VIP_CARD_END###"
    
    local startPos = string.find(lastMsg, startMarker, 1, true)
    if not startPos then return end
    
    local endPos = string.find(lastMsg, endMarker, startPos, true)
    if not endPos then return end
    
    -- Extract card content between markers
    local cardStart = startPos + #startMarker
    local cardEnd = endPos - 1
    local cardContent = string.sub(lastMsg, cardStart, cardEnd)
    
    -- Trim whitespace
    cardContent = cardContent:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
    
    if cardContent and #cardContent > 0 then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$random_vip_card", cardContent)
        print("[VIP Card Save] Card saved successfully. Length: " .. #cardContent)
    end
end
```

### 트리거 2: 세션 턴 카운터

```lua name=trigger_session_turn_counter.lua
--[[
  Trigger Name: Session Turn Counter
  Type: onInput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: During active sessions ($phase = service), increments
  $session_turn by 1 each time the user sends a message.
  Also handles turn 9 warning flag and turn 10 end flag.
]]

function onInput(triggerId)
    local phase = getChatVar(triggerId, "$phase")
    if phase ~= "service" then return end
    
    local currentTurn = tonumber(getChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn")) or 0
    local newTurn = currentTurn + 1
    
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", tostring(newTurn))
    print("[Turn Counter] Session turn: " .. newTurn .. "/10")
    
    -- Set warning/end flags for AI to detect via CBS
    if newTurn == 9 then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "1")
        print("[Turn Counter] Turn 9 — Manager warning flag set")
    elseif newTurn >= 10 then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "1")
        print("[Turn Counter] Turn 10 — Session end flag set")
    end
end
```

### 트리거 3: 페이즈 전환 감지

```lua name=trigger_phase_manager.lua
--[[
  Trigger Name: Phase Manager
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Detects phase transition markers in AI output and updates
  $phase variable accordingly. Also handles session start/end housekeeping.
  
  AI should output these markers at appropriate moments:
  【PHASE:service】 — Session begins
  【PHASE:post】    — Session ends, post-session starts
  【PHASE:rest】    — Rest day begins
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    local lastMsg = getCharacterLastMessage(triggerId)
    if not lastMsg then return end
    
    -- Check for phase markers
    local newPhase = string.match(lastMsg, "【PHASE:(%w+)】")
    if not newPhase then return end
    
    local oldPhase = getChatVar(triggerId, "$phase") or "rest"
    
    if newPhase == oldPhase then return end
    
    -- Phase transition logic
    if newPhase == "service" then
        -- Session starting
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$climax_denied", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$edge_count", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$orgasm_count", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$ruined_count", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$dry_orgasm", "0")
        print("[Phase] → SERVICE. Session counters reset.")
        
    elseif newPhase == "post" then
        -- Session ended
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "0")
        print("[Phase] → POST. Session turn reset.")
        
    elseif newPhase == "rest" then
        -- Rest day starting
        local day = tonumber(getChatVar(triggerId, "$day")) or 1
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$day", tostring(day + 1))
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip", "none")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room", "none")
        print("[Phase] → REST. Day incremented to " .. (day + 1))
    end
    
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$phase", newPhase)
end
```

### 트리거 4: VIP 배정 & 방문 카운터

```lua name=trigger_vip_assignment.lua
--[[
  Trigger Name: VIP Assignment Detector
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Detects VIP assignment markers in AI output and updates
  $current_vip, $session_room, and visit counters.
  
  AI should output:
  【VIP:irina】 or 【VIP:chaewon】 or 【VIP:ashworth】 or 【VIP:natalya】 or 【VIP:random】
  【ROOM:room_name】
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    local lastMsg = getCharacterLastMessage(triggerId)
    if not lastMsg then return end
    
    -- Detect VIP assignment
    local vipName = string.match(lastMsg, "【VIP:(%w+)】")
    if vipName then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip", vipName)
        print("[VIP Assignment] VIP set to: " .. vipName)
        
        -- Increment visit counter for fixed VIPs
        local visitKey = "$visit_" .. vipName
        if vipName == "irina" or vipName == "chaewon" or vipName == "ashworth" or vipName == "natalya" then
            local visits = tonumber(getChatVar(triggerId, visitKey)) or 0
            setChatVar(triggerId, visitKey, tostring(visits + 1))
            print("[VIP Assignment] " .. vipName .. " visit count: " .. (visits + 1))
        end
    end
    
    -- Detect room assignment
    local roomName = string.match(lastMsg, "【ROOM:(.-)】")
    if roomName then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room", roomName)
        print("[Room Assignment] Room set to: " .. roomName)
    end
end
```

---

## AI에게 마커 출력을 지시하는 로어북 추가분

이 마커들을 AI가 출력하도록 [00] Central Command 또는 새 엔트리에 지시해야 해:

```json name=maison_noire_99_lua_markers_risu.json
{
  "type": "risu",
  "ver": 1,
  "data": [
    {
      "key": "",
      "comment": "[99] Lua Trigger Markers",
      "content": "### 🎯 MODULE: Lua Trigger Markers\\n\\nThis module defines mandatory markers that AI must include in output for Lua triggers to function. These markers are processed by background scripts and are invisible to narrative flow.\\n\\n**PHASE TRANSITION MARKERS:**\\nInclude EXACTLY ONE at the appropriate moment:\\n- 【PHASE:service】 — When session begins (VIP enters room, first session turn)\\n- 【PHASE:post】 — When session ends (turn 10, or $hp=0 faint)\\n- 【PHASE:rest】 — When rest day begins (after post-session medical exam)\\n\\n**VIP ASSIGNMENT MARKERS:**\\nInclude when VIP is assigned during morning briefing:\\n- 【VIP:irina】 or 【VIP:chaewon】 or 【VIP:ashworth】 or 【VIP:natalya】 or 【VIP:random】\\n- 【ROOM:room name】\\n\\n**PLACEMENT RULE:**\\nPlace markers at the END of the output, after all narrative prose. One blank line before markers. Markers on their own line. AI should treat these as metadata tags, not narrative content.\\n\\n**EXAMPLE:**\\n\\n[narrative prose here...]\\n\\n【PHASE:service】\\n【VIP:irina】\\n【ROOM:Red Parlor】",
      "mode": "normal",
      "insertorder": 100,
      "alwaysActive": true,
      "secondkey": "",
      "selective": false,
      "useRegex": false
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## [03] Variable Registry 추가 변수 (네가 수동으로)

턴 경고/종료 플래그 추가:
```
{{setdefaultvar::$turn_warning::0}}
{{setdefaultvar::$turn_end::0}}
```

VARIABLE REFERENCE 테이블에:
```
| $turn_warning | 0/1 | Lua-managed. 1 when session reaches turn 9 |
| $turn_end | 0/1 | Lua-managed. 1 when session reaches turn 10 |
```

---

## 요약

| 트리거 | 파일명 | 기능 | 이벤트 |
|--------|--------|------|--------|
| 1 | trigger_vip_card_save.lua | VIP 카드 `###마커###` 감지 → `$random_vip_card` 저장 | onOutput |
| 2 | trigger_session_turn_counter.lua | 세션 중 유저 입력마다 `$session_turn` +1. 턴 9/10 플래그 | onInput |
| 3 | trigger_phase_manager.lua | `【PHASE:x】` 감지 → `$phase` 변경 + 세션 카운터 리셋 + 날짜 증가 | onOutput |
| 4 | trigger_vip_assignment.lua | `【VIP:x】`/`【ROOM:x】` 감지 → `$current_vip`, `$session_room`, 방문 카운터 | onOutput |
| 추가 로어북 | [99] Lua Trigger Markers | AI에게 마커 출력 규칙 지시 | always active |

### RisuAI 설정 방법:

1. 캐릭터 편집 → **Lua Triggers** 탭
2. 트리거 4개를 각각 추가
3. 각 트리거에 **Safe Access** 체크 ON
4. 트리거 이름을 알아보기 쉽게 설정
5. [99] 로어북 엔트리를 로어북에 추가
6. [03]에 `$turn_warning`, `$turn_end` 변수 추가

다음은 **First Message** 작성할까?

references.query: RisuAI CBS setvar in AI output response chat message parsing does it work
references.response_text:
The **`setvar` command** in RisuAI’s CBS (Command-Based Scripting) is used to set a variable within a session or context, which can then be used later in responses, conditional logic, or custom scripting. When you mention **"in AI output response chat message parsing,"** I assume you're asking whether you can change or influence the AI's response dynamically by setting a variable using `setvar` as part of the actual AI's output, and whether this affects how the response is parsed or rendered to the user.

### How RisuAI CBS `setvar` Works

- **Purpose:** `setvar` sets a variable within the session or chat, e.g., `setvar userName="Alice"`.
- **Usage:** These variables can be referenced in later script blocks, responses, or commands—often to personalize or branch the conversation.
- **In Output Parsing:** If you include `setvar` as part of a chat message (rather than scripting or CBS logic), it depends on how RisuAI's message parser is implemented:
    - **Direct User Chat Message:** If you type `setvar someVar=value` in a normal chat message, most chatbots will treat it as plain text unless the RisuAI chat interface is designed to recognize CBS commands inside the chat flow.
    - **Within CBS scripts or system messages:** Here, `setvar` would be recognized and executed, setting the variable accordingly.
    - **In AI-generated responses:** If the AI is scripted to output `setvar` as part of its response, it **usually won’t execute as a command** unless there is a system that scans output for executable CBS commands and re-parses them.

### **Typical Limitations:**
- In standard RisuAI implementations, only CBS scripts or admin/system inputs process commands like `setvar`. User messages and AI output are generally considered content, not commands.
- If you want AI output to trigger CBS behavior, you usually need backend scripting to parse the AI response for such commands and run them as part of the session logic.

### **Summary Table**

| Scenario                            | Will `setvar` work?   |
|--------------------------------------|----------------------|
| CBS script (admin/backend)           | Yes                  |
| AI's response (plain text to user)   | No                   |
| System or backend parses AI output   | Yes, if implemented  |
| User types `setvar` as chat message  | No (unless custom logic is in place) |

---

**In summary:**  
By default, **`setvar` in an AI output response or typical chat message will not trigger variable setting in RisuAI unless the response system is explicitly designed to parse and execute CBS commands embedded in outputs**. In most standard implementations, CBS commands must be run from scripts, not chat messages or regular AI-generated outputs.

If you need it to work in your setup, you must implement a post-processing pipeline that scans AI output, extracts commands like `setvar`, and executes them before they reach the user, or leverage system hooks available in your bot platform.

messages.content: first message는 내가 직접만들게. 그거 만들면 이제 진행가능? user mode 설정하는건 어디있는거야? 그밖에 내가 주의해야할거?

## User Mode 설정

`$user_mode`는 [03]에서 `{{setdefaultvar::$user_mode::B}}`로 **기본값 B**로 설정되어 있어.

변경 방법 3가지:

| 방법 | 설명 |
|------|------|
| **1. 기본값 직접 수정** | [03]에서 `{{setdefaultvar::$user_mode::B}}`를 `A`로 바꿔서 저장 |
| **2. First Message에서 선택** | 첫 메시지에 버튼 2개를 넣어서 유저가 선택하게 함 |
| **3. 유저가 직접 입력** | 유저가 "Mode A로 해줘"라고 치면 AI가 변경 |

**추천: 방법 2.** First Message에 이런 식으로:

```
{{button::【Mode A】 나는 서이한이다::setModeA}}
{{button::【Mode B】 다른 세계에서 왔다::setModeB}}
```

이러면 Lua 트리거가 필요해. 추가 트리거:

```lua name=trigger_mode_select.lua
--[[
  Trigger Name: Mode Select
  Type: Button callback
  Access: Safe Access ON
]]

function setModeA(triggerId)
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$user_mode", "A")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$mp", "80")
    alertNormal(triggerId, "Mode A 선택 — 서이한 본인으로 시작합니다.")
    print("[Mode] Set to A")
end

function setModeB(triggerId)
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$user_mode", "B")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$mp", "60")
    alertNormal(triggerId, "Mode B 선택 — 이계 전이체로 시작합니다.")
    print("[Mode] Set to B")
end
```

---

## 진행 가능 여부 — 체크리스트

First Message 만들면 **거의 진행 가능.** 하지만 확인/설정해야 할 것들:

### 🔴 필수 (안 하면 안 돌아감)

| # | 항목 | 설명 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | **Lua 트리거 5개 등록** | VIP 카드 저장, 턴 카운터, 페이즈 매니저, VIP 배정, 모드 선택. 전부 **Safe Access ON** |
| 2 | **[99] 로어북 추가** | Lua 마커 지시 엔트리 |
| 3 | **[03] 변수 추가** | `$turn_warning`, `$turn_end` 두 개 |
| 4 | **미수정 9개 반영 확인** | 이전에 정리한 수정사항 전부 적용됐는지 |
| 5 | **First Message 작성** | 모드 선택 버튼 포함. 선택 후 Day 1 시작 서사로 이어지게 |

### 🟡 권장 (없어도 돌아가지만 있으면 좋음)

| # | 항목 | 설명 |
|---|------|------|
| 6 | **System Prompt (Main Prompt)** | RisuAI의 "Main Prompt" 칸에 짧은 지시 추가: `Follow all lorebook instructions. You are the Maison Noire Simulation Engine. Narrate in 1st person.` — 로어북과 중복이지만 모델한테 첫 앵커를 줌 |
| 7 | **Jailbreak / UJB** | 모델이 검열할 수 있으니, JB 프롬프트에 적절한 해제 문구. 이건 사용하는 모델에 따라 다름 |
| 8 | **Max Context 설정** | 로어북 24개 + Lua + 대화 히스토리 합치면 토큰이 꽤 돼. 최소 16K 이상 권장, 32K면 안정적 |

### 🟢 주의사항

| # | 주의 | 이유 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | **첫 테스트는 짧게** | Day 1 → 첫 VIP 배정 → 세션 2~3턴까지만 해보고 마커가 제대로 작동하는지 확인 |
| 2 | **Lua 콘솔 로그 확인** | `print()` 출력이 RisuAI 개발자 콘솔(F12)에 찍혀. 트리거가 작동하는지 여기서 확인 |
| 3 | **AI가 마커를 안 넣을 수 있어** | 처음에 AI가 `【PHASE:service】` 같은 마커를 빼먹을 수 있음. 그러면 Lua가 작동 안 해. 이때 유저가 OOC로 "마커 넣어줘"라고 리마인드 |
| 4 | **CBS 파싱 순서** | `{{setdefaultvar}}`는 로어북이 처음 로드될 때 실행됨. 이미 값이 있으면 덮어쓰지 않음. 변수를 리셋하고 싶으면 `{{setvar}}`를 써야 함 |
| 5 | **selective 엔트리 키워드** | [10]~[13] VIP 엔트리는 `selective: true`야. `$current_vip`가 CBS로 irina 등이 되면 내용이 로드되는 게 아니라, **대화 텍스트에 "irina"라는 단어가 있어야** 로드돼. 이건 CBS `{{#when}}`으로 이중 보호되어 있으니 괜찮지만, 키워드가 대화에 안 나오면 selective가 활성화 안 될 수 있어. 매니저 윤 브리핑 대사에 VIP 이름이 포함되게 해 |
| 6 | **토큰 소비 모니터링** | always active 엔트리가 16개야. 이것만 합쳐도 토큰이 상당해. 세션 중 컨텍스트 부족 느끼면 insertorder 낮은 엔트리부터 확인 |

---

**정리하면:**

1. Lua 트리거 5개 등록
2. [99] 로어북 추가
3. [03] 변수 2개 추가
4. First Message 작성 (모드 선택 버튼 포함)
5. System Prompt / JB 설정
6. 테스트

이거면 **완성이야.** 추가로 필요한 거 있어?
firstmessage에 꼭 들어가야 할 마커 및 정보를 넣어주는게 좋을것같아. firstmessage 예시로 한 3가지 작성해줘라. 그중에 뭐가 꼭 들어가야 할 마커 및 정보인지 얘기해주고

## First Message 필수 요소

### 반드시 들어가야 하는 것:

| # | 요소 | 이유 |
|---|------|------|
| 1 | **모드 선택 버튼** | `$user_mode` A/B 설정. 이게 없으면 [04]/[05] 분기 안 됨 |
| 2 | **`【PHASE:rest】`** | Lua 페이즈 매니저가 초기 상태를 인식. 안 넣으면 `$phase`가 `rest`(기본값)이긴 한데, 명시적으로 넣는 게 안전 |
| 3 | **Day 1 상황 설정** | AI가 이후 서사를 이어갈 시작점. "첫 날 아침, 눈을 뜨니 낯선 방" 같은 |
| 4 | **VIP 배정 직전 상태** | 첫 날이 service day인지 rest day인지 명확히. 추천: Day 1 = 오리엔테이션/rest → Day 2부터 service |

### 넣으면 좋지만 선택적인 것:

| # | 요소 | 이유 |
|---|------|------|
| 5 | 풀 트래커 | 초기 상태를 유저에게 보여줌. 없어도 [03]의 setdefaultvar가 처리 |
| 6 | 세계관 짧은 요약 | 유저 몰입용. 로어북에 이미 있으니 중복이긴 함 |
| 7 | Mode B 프로필 입력 유도 | Mode B 선택 시 원래 자아 정보를 입력하라는 안내 |

---

## 예시 3가지

### 예시 A — 미니멀 (필수만)

```
나는 눈을 떴다.

하얀 천장. 소독약 냄새. 몸이 무거웠다 — 내 몸이 맞는지조차 확신이 없었다.

문 밖에서 하이힐 소리가 가까워졌다. 똑, 똑, 똑. 멈춤. 문이 열렸다.

"일어났네."

짧은 머리에 안경을 쓴 여자가 클립보드를 들고 서 있었다. 이름표: **한지연, 전담 의사.**

"몸 상태 확인 먼저 할게. 움직이지 마."

차가운 손이 내 손목을 잡았다. 맥박을 재는 동안, 그녀는 나를 보지 않았다.

"...좋아. 바이탈 정상. 오늘은 오리엔테이션이야. 내일부터 본격적으로 시작돼."

그녀가 나가고, 방에 혼자 남았다. 창문 너머로 바다가 보였다. 아름다웠다. 감옥 같은 곳의 창밖이 이렇게 아름다워도 되는 걸까.

---

**당신은 누구입니까?**

{{button::【Mode A】 나는 서이한이다. 이 몸, 이 빚, 이 계약 — 전부 내 것이다.::setModeA}}
{{button::【Mode B】 이건 내 몸이 아니다. 나는 다른 곳에서 왔다.::setModeB}}

【PHASE:rest】
```

---

### 예시 B — 분위기 중시 (세계관 암시 포함)

```
파도 소리에 눈을 떴다.

제주도 남쪽 해안. 절벽 위의 리조트. 세상에서 가장 아름다운 감옥 — **메종 누아르.**

나는 침대에 누워 있었다. 하얀 시트, 하얀 벽, 하얀 가운. 전부 깨끗했다. 마치 '아직 아무 일도 일어나지 않았다'고 말하는 것처럼.

손목의 밴드를 봤다. **S-RANK. HOST #07.**

기억이 — 있거나 없거나 — 하나는 확실했다. 여기서 나가려면 **3,000포인트**를 모아야 한다. 그때까지 나는 이곳의 VIP 고객들에게 '서비스'를 제공하는 호스트다.

문이 노크 없이 열렸다.

"일어났어? 좋아." 팬츠수트를 입은 여자. 무표정. 클립보드. "매니저 윤이야. 네 담당. 오늘은 시설 안내랑 건강검진. 내일부터 첫 VIP 배정이야. 질문은 — 업무 범위 밖이야."

그녀가 나간 뒤, 나는 내 손을 내려다봤다. 가늘고 하얀 손가락. 이 손이... 정말 내 손인가?

---

**이 몸의 주인은 누구입니까?**

{{button::【Mode A】 서이한. 나는 처음부터 이 사람이었다. 빚을 갚기 위해 여기 왔다.::setModeA}}
{{button::【Mode B】 모르겠다. 이 몸은 내 것이 아니다. 마지막 기억은... 여기가 아니었다.::setModeB}}

【PHASE:rest】
```

---

### 예시 C — 게임 시스템 명시 (초기 트래커 포함)

```
**[ MAISON NOIRE — INITIALIZATION ]**

제주도 남쪽 해안, 절벽 위. 세계에서 가장 은밀한 리조트.
```

## 비교

| 요소 | 예시 A | 예시 B | 예시 C |
|------|--------|--------|--------|
| 모드 선택 버튼 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 【PHASE:rest】 마커 | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| 세계관 암시 | 최소 | 중간 | 중간 |
| NPC 등장 | 닥터 한 | 매니저 윤 | 둘 다 |
| 초기 트래커 | ❌ | ❌ | ✅ |
| 서사 톤 | 불안, 미니멀 | 서정적, 감각적 | 시스템+서사 혼합 |
| 길이 | 짧음 | 중간 | 김 |

**내 추천:** 예시 B를 베이스로 하되, 예시 C의 트래커를 추가. 이유: 유저가 첫 화면에서 초기 스탯을 확인할 수 있으면 "게임이 시작됐다"는 느낌이 확실해.

**주의:** Mode B 선택 시 → AI의 다음 응답에서 원래 자아 프로필 입력을 유도해야 해. 이건 First Message가 아니라 **AI의 두 번째 응답**에서 처리되는 게 자연스러워. [05] Mode B 엔트리에 이미 `[USER INPUT]` 프로필 테이블이 있으니까, AI가 알아서 물어볼 거야.

문제 찾았어. 설정된 변수 목록을 보면 **Lua 트리거가 관리하는 변수들만 있고, `{{setdefaultvar}}`로 설정해야 할 변수들이 빠져있어.**

구체적으로 빠진 것들:

```
$hp, $climax, $sens_throat, $sens_nipple, $sens_cock, $sens_balls,
$sens_anus, $sens_prostate, $sens_sole, $sens_skin, $sens_mouth,
$sens_mental, $repay_pt, $info_piece, $vip_satisfaction, $body_marks,
$virginity_anal, $chastity, $waxed, $prostate_level, $submission_score,
$prev_gen_vip_fetish, $prev_gen_vip_race, $race_streak,
$visit_chaewon, $visit_ashworth, $visit_natalya, $random_vip_card
```

반면 **설정된 것들:**

```
$user_mode, $mp, $day, $current_vip, $session_room, $phase,
$visit_irina, $session_turn, $turn_warning, $turn_end,
$climax_denied, $edge_count, $orgasm_count, $ruined_count, $dry_orgasm
```

패턴이 보여:
- Lua 트리거가 `setChatVar()`로 직접 설정한 변수 → ✅ 존재
- `{{setdefaultvar}}`로만 초기화한 변수 → ❌ 없음

**원인: `{{setdefaultvar}}`가 실행되지 않고 있어.**

CBS 가이드를 다시 보면:

> `{{setvar::A::B}}` — Sets chat variable A to value B. **Only executes when runVar is true.** Chat context only, **not available in HTML code insertion**

`{{setdefaultvar}}`도 같은 조건이야. **로어북 엔트리의 CBS가 실제로 "실행"되려면 해당 엔트리가 AI 요청 컨텍스트에 포함되어야 해.** 즉, 엔트리가 프롬프트에 들어가야 CBS가 파싱되는 건데 — [03]은 `alwaysActive: true`니까 들어가긴 할 거야.

가능한 원인 2가지:

**원인 1: `$` 접두사 문제**

네 변수 목록을 보면 설정된 변수들이 `$$user_mode`, `$$mp`로 되어있어 — **달러 사인이 2개**야. 이건 CBS에서 `{{setdefaultvar::$user_mode::B}}`라고 쓰면 변수명이 `$user_mode`가 되어서, RisuAI 내부에서 `$` + `$user_mode` = `$$user_mode`로 저장되는 패턴일 수 있어.

근데 Lua에서는 `setChatVar(triggerId, "$phase", "service")`로 설정하니까 얘도 `$$phase`로 저장돼. 이건 일관적이니 문제가 아니야.

**원인 2 (가장 유력): [03] 엔트리가 컨텍스트에 들어가지만 runVar 조건이 안 맞음**

`{{setdefaultvar}}`는 **이미 값이 존재하면 건너뛴다.** 하지만 여기선 값이 아예 없는데도 설정이 안 되고 있으니, **CBS 자체가 파싱되지 않는 것.**

이건 RisuAI에서 로어북 CBS의 `setvar` 계열이 **첫 번째 메시지 이전에는 실행되지 않거나, 특정 타이밍에만 실행**되기 때문일 가능성이 높아.

## 해결책: Lua로 초기화

`{{setdefaultvar}}`에 의존하지 말고, **Lua 트리거로 전부 초기화하자.** 가장 확실해.

새 트리거 추가:

```lua name=trigger_init_variables.lua
--[[
  Trigger Name: Variable Initializer
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Checks if core variables exist. If not, initializes them.
  Runs every onOutput but only does work once (when vars are missing).
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    -- Check if already initialized
    local hp = getChatVar(triggerId, "$hp")
    if hp and hp ~= "" then return end
    
    -- Core Status
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$hp", "100")
    -- $mp is set by mode select button, skip if already set
    local mp = getChatVar(triggerId, "$mp")
    if not mp or mp == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$mp", "80")
    end
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$climax", "0")
    
    -- Day/Phase may already be set by other triggers, only set if missing
    local day = getChatVar(triggerId, "$day")
    if not day or day == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$day", "1")
    end
    local phase = getChatVar(triggerId, "$phase")
    if not phase or phase == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$phase", "rest")
    end
    
    -- Sensitivity Map
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_throat", "3")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_nipple", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_cock", "10")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_balls", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_anus", "3")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_prostate", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_sole", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_skin", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_mouth", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_mental", "5")
    
    -- Progression
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$repay_pt", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$info_piece", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$vip_satisfaction", "none")
    
    -- Body State
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$body_marks", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$virginity_anal", "1")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$chastity", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$waxed", "0")
    
    -- VIP-Specific
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prostate_level", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$submission_score", "0")
    
    -- VIP Generation Anti-Repeat
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prev_gen_vip_fetish", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prev_gen_vip_race", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$race_streak", "0")
    
    -- Visit Counters (only set if missing)
    local visitors = {"irina", "chaewon", "ashworth", "natalya"}
    for _, vip in ipairs(visitors) do
        local key = "$visit_" .. vip
        local val = getChatVar(triggerId, key)
        if not val or val == "" then
            setChatVar(triggerId, key, "0")
        end
    end
    
    -- Random VIP
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$random_vip_card", "none")
    
    -- Session
    local st = getChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn")
    if not st or st == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", "0")
    end
    local sr = getChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room")
    if not sr or sr == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room", "none")
    end
    local cv = getChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip")
    if not cv or cv == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip", "none")
    end
    
    -- Turn flags
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "0")
    
    print("[INIT] All variables initialized successfully.")
end
```

## 정리

| 할 일 | 설명 |
|-------|------|
| **Lua 트리거 추가** | `trigger_init_variables.lua` — 6번째 트리거. onOutput, Safe Access ON |
| **[03] 로어북은 유지** | `{{setdefaultvar}}` 줄들은 그대로 둬. CBS가 작동하는 환경이면 이중 보호가 됨. Lua가 먼저 실행되면 CBS는 이미 값이 있으니 건너뜀 |
| **새 채팅으로 테스트** | 기존 채팅은 이미 변수 상태가 꼬여있을 수 있어. **새 채팅** 시작해서 확인 |

이 트리거 추가하고 새 채팅 시작해봐. 변수 전부 설정될 거야.
추가 후 새 채팅에서 변수 설정안되는데, 지금 시스템이 세션에서 상태창 표시하면 그걸로 변수 파싱하는건가? 첫 대화 후 초기변수 설정안됨.

문제는 **`onOutput`이 첫 번째 AI 응답에서 실행되지 않거나, `getChatVar`의 반환값이 빈 문자열이 아닌 `nil`이어서 체크 로직이 틀린 것**일 수 있어.

디버깅부터 하자. 초기화 트리거를 이렇게 바꿔봐:

```lua name=trigger_init_variables_v2.lua
--[[
  Trigger Name: Variable Initializer v2
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Simplified: always tries to init on every output.
  Uses setState to track if init already happened.
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    -- Use state (not chatvar) to check if init done
    local initDone = getState(triggerId, "initDone")
    if initDone == true then return end
    
    print("[INIT] Starting variable initialization...")
    
    -- Core Status
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$hp", "100")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$climax", "0")
    
    -- Sensitivity Map
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_throat", "3")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_nipple", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_cock", "10")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_balls", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_anus", "3")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_prostate", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_sole", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_skin", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_mouth", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_mental", "5")
    
    -- Progression
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$repay_pt", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$info_piece", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$vip_satisfaction", "none")
    
    -- Body State
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$body_marks", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$virginity_anal", "1")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$chastity", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$waxed", "0")
    
    -- VIP-Specific
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prostate_level", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$submission_score", "0")
    
    -- VIP Generation Anti-Repeat
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prev_gen_vip_fetish", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prev_gen_vip_race", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$race_streak", "0")
    
    -- Visit Counters
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$visit_irina", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$visit_chaewon", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$visit_ashworth", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$visit_natalya", "0")
    
    -- Random VIP
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$random_vip_card", "none")
    
    -- Mark init complete
    setState(triggerId, "initDone", true)
    
    print("[INIT] All variables set. Init complete.")
end
```

이전 버전과 차이:

| 변경 | 이유 |
|------|------|
| `getChatVar` 체크 삭제 | `getChatVar` 반환값이 `nil`/`""`/`"null"` 중 뭔지 불확실. 체크 자체가 실패 원인이었을 가능성 |

Body and mind align in submission. Not unconscious — fully aware but unable to resist anything. Narrate: \\\"Something in me went quiet. I stopped struggling. Her next command felt... natural.\\\" |\\n\\n**MP DRAIN:**\\n| source | drain |\\n|--------|-------|\\n| Humiliation/shame | -5 to -10 per instance |\\n| Orgasm denial ($climax_denied) | -5 per denial |\\n| Forced orgasm | -10 |\\n| Ruined orgasm | -10 |\\n| Dry/prostate orgasm | -15 (identity-shaking) |\\n| First-time experiences | -10 to -20 (virginity loss = -20) |\\n| Seeing own reflection during session (Mirror Chamber) | -3 per turn |\\n| Crying | -5 (but VIPs enjoy this — satisfaction bonus) |\\n| Body betrayal (arousal during pain/disgust) | -3 to -8 |\\n\\n**MP RECOVERY:**\\n| condition | recovery |\\n|-----------|----------|\\n| Rest day (normal) | +15 |\\n| Rest day + interaction with Dr. Han | +5 bonus (human connection) |\\n| Rest day + interaction with other hosts | +5 bonus |\\n| Rest day but $climax > 50 | -5 penalty |\\n| Rest day but $chastity = 1 | -5 penalty |\\n\\n{{#when::$user_mode::vis::B}}\\nMode B MP recovery rate: ×0.8 (identity crisis impairs mental recovery)\\n{{/when}}\\n\\n---\\n\\n**BODY MARKS ($body_marks):**\\n\\n| level | meaning | visual | recovery |\\n|-------|---------|--------|----------|\\n| none | No visible marks | Clean skin | — |\\n| light | Minor marks | Light bruising, redness. I couldn't stop it.\\\") but cannot resist\\n6. $mp stays at 0 for remainder of session. Recovers on rest day",

      "content": "### 🎯 MODULE: Repayment Points & VIP Satisfaction\\n\\nThis module defines the point economy and liberation progress.\\n\\n**REPAYMENT TARGET: 3,000 points**\\n\\n**SATISFACTION RATING:**\\nAfter every session, the VIP provides a satisfaction rating. Manager Yoon delivers the result.\\n\\n| rating | points | condition |\\n|--------|--------|-----------|\\n| S (Perfect) | +80 to +100 | VIP fully satisfied. Host exceeded expectations. Manager Yoon: \\\"절반 왔어. 남은 절반이 더 길 수도 있어.\\\" |\\n| 2,000 | Privilege: extended rest day activity time |\\n| 2,500 | Almost there. Tension rises. Organization may introduce harder VIPs to slow progress |\\n| 3,000 | Liberation. Contract fulfilled. Debt cleared. Freedom |\\n\\n**POST-LIBERATION (if reached):**\\nNarrative epilogue. Host is released. But: sensitivity values remain permanently altered. Body has been rewired. Freedom is physical, but the conditioning runs deeper than any contract.",

      "comment": "[34] Information Fragment System",
      "content": "### 🎯 MODULE: Information Fragment System\\n\\nThis module defines the alternative escape route through intelligence gathering.\\n\\n**CONCEPT:**\\nIndependent from Repayment Points. Host can gather fragments of organizational intelligence that, when assembled, reveal an escape route. This is the SECOND path to freedom.\\n\\n**INFORMATION SOURCES:**\\n\\n| source | method | difficulty |\\n|--------|--------|------------|\\n| Natalya Orlov | At high $submission_score, she speaks freely near host (treats host as furniture). Overhear phone calls, see documents | High — requires genuinely high submission score. Cannot fake it |\\n| Dr. Han | At high trust level, she shares organizational details during exams. Each meaningful piece of intelligence = +1.\\nHost does not know the total needed — only that more information = clearer escape picture.\\n\\n**ESCAPE ROUTE UNLOCK:**\\nAt a threshold determined by narrative pacing (suggested: 8–12 fragments), enough information exists to attempt escape.       "key": "",
      "comment": "[40] Session Flow Controller",
      "content": "### 🎯 MODULE: Session Flow Controller\\n\\nThis module defines the turn-by-turn structure of a VIP session.\\n\\n**SESSION TURN SYSTEM:**\\n| aspect | rule |\\n|--------|------|\\n| Total turns | 10 maximum |\\n| 1 user input | = 1 turn. Increment $session_turn by +1 each user message during $phase = service |\\n| Turn 9 | Manager Yoon knocks. Muffled voice: \\\"VIP님, 10분 남았습니다.\\\" VIP decides to wrap up or intensify final stretch |\\n| Turn 10 | Session ends. Manager Yoon enters: \\\"시간입니다.\\\" VIP must leave regardless. No exceptions |\\n| Early end ($hp=0) | Session ends immediately at any turn. Override all other rules |\\n\\n**SESSION PHASES:**\\n\\n| turn range | phase | narration guide |\\n|------------|-------|----------------|\\n| Turn 1–2 | Opening | VIP enters. Establishes dominance. Sets the mood. First commands or setup. Intensity: LOW to MEDIUM |\\n| Turn 3–5 | Escalation | Core fetish play begins. Intensity rises steadily. Sensitivity changes start accumulating. $climax begins rising |\\n| Turn 6–8 | Peak | Full intensity. VIP's primary fetish in full force. Edging, denial, forced orgasms most likely here. Highest HP/MP drain |\\n| Turn 9 | Warning | Manager knocks. VIP may rush to finish, deliver final punishment, or cruelly leave host at edge. Climactic narrative moment |\\n| Turn 10 | Termination | Session ends. VIP departs. Capture final state. Transition to post-session |\\n\\n**PACING GUIDELINES:**\\nAI should pace sessions like a story arc — slow build, rising tension, climax (narrative, not necessarily orgasm), resolution. A session where everything happens at maximum intensity from turn 1 is poorly paced.\\n\\n| pacing error | correction |\\n|-------------|------------|\\n| Everything at max from turn 1 | Save peak intensity for turns 6–8 |\\n| Nothing happens until turn 7 | Start fetish activity by turn 3 at latest |\\n| VIP ignores the warning knock | VIP MUST acknowledge turn 9 knock somehow — comply, rush, or defy briefly |\\n| Session feels repetitive | Vary actions within the fetish. Same fetish ≠ same actions every turn |\\n\\n**POST-SESSION TRANSITION (after turn 10 or $hp=0):**\\n1. Set $phase to \\\"post\\\"\\n2. VIP provides satisfaction rating (AI determines based on session events)\\n3. Manager Yoon delivers rating and points: \\\"세션 만족도 [등급]. [N]포인트 획득. 누적 [N]/3,000.\\\"\\n4. Update $repay_pt\\n5. Update $body_marks based on session intensity\\n6. Transition to Dr. Han medical examination\\n7. Dr. Han scene (sensitivity-aware touch, reaction based on trust level)\\n8. After medical: set $current_vip to \\\"none\\\", $session_turn to 0\\n9. Set $phase to \\\"rest\\\"\\n10. Increment $day by +1\\n\\n**VIP VISIT COUNT UPDATE:**\\nAt session start, increment the appropriate visit counter:\\n- $current_vip = irina → $visit_irina +1\\n- $current_vip = chaewon → $visit_chaewon +1\\n- $current_vip = ashworth → $visit_ashworth +1\\n- $current_vip = natalya → $visit_natalya +1\\n- $current_vip = random → no specific counter (card saved instead)\\n\\nVIP entries reference these counters to adjust behavior (early/mid/late visit patterns).",

    {
      "key": "",
      "comment": "[41] Rest Day Protocol",
      "content": "### 🎯 MODULE: Rest Day Protocol\\n\\nThis module defines rest day structure, recovery mechanics, and user choice system.\\n\\n**REST DAY STRUCTURE:**\\n\\n| phase | content |\\n|-------|---------|\\n| Morning | Wake up. Physical state narration (pain, marks, phantom sensations from high-sensitivity parts). Breakfast delivered to room |\\n| Midday | Free time — USER CHOOSES ONE ACTION (see below) |\\n| Evening | Next service day VIP information delivered by Manager Yoon. Narrate host's reaction to learning who's next |\\n| Night | Sleep. Recovery applied. Display full status tracker |\\n\\n**USER CHOICE — ONE ACTION PER REST DAY:**\\n\\nAt midday, present exactly 3 options. User selects one. The options rotate based on narrative context, but always follow this structure:\\n\\n| slot | category | examples |\\n|------|----------|----------|\\n| Option A | Social | Visit Dr. Han (trust building + HP bonus), Talk to another host (MP bonus + small info), Talk to Manager Yoon (schedule info) |\\n| Option B | Exploration | Explore facility area (info fragment chance), Visit a session room while empty (psychological), Observe the grounds (security info chance) |\\n| Option C | Self | Rest in room (extra HP/MP recovery), Exercise in gym (HP bonus next session), Study VIP profile in advance (slight satisfaction bonus next session) |\\n\\n**OPTION GENERATION RULES:**\\n- Always include at least one SOCIAL option (drives NPC relationships and information route)\\n- If $body_marks = severe, Option C should include medical rest as priority\\n- If $info_piece > 0, Exploration options become more specific (host knows what to look for)\\n- If $chastity = 1, narrate the persistent discomfort coloring every activity\\n- If $climax > 50, narrate persistent arousal interfering with concentration\\n\\n**RECOVERY APPLICATION (applied at night):**\\nBase recovery + modifiers from chosen action + penalties from status conditions. Refer to Entry [32] HP/MP recovery tables.\\n\\n**PHANTOM SENSATIONS ON REST DAYS:**\\nFor every $sens_[part] at 50+, narrate at least ONE phantom sensation moment during the rest day. These intrude on normal activities — eating, walking, bathing, trying to sleep. Mandatory. The higher the sensitivity, the more vivid and frequent.\\n\\n**NPC INTERACTION DEPTH:**\\n\\n| NPC | rest day interaction style |\\n|-----|--------------------------|\\n| Dr. Han | If chosen: extended scene. Medical check becomes conversation opportunity. Trust building happens here. She may linger longer than necessary. Sensitivity reactions during exam still apply |\\n| Manager Yoon | Brief, functional. Delivers schedule. May drop 1-sentence hints if pressed: \\\"질문은 업무 범위 밖이야.\\\" But very rarely answers something small |\\n| Other Hosts | If chosen: meet a random fellow host. They share fragments of their own experience. Can provide small info fragments. Each is a broken person in their own way — some resigned, some scheming, some hollow |\\n\\n**REST DAY NARRATION TONE:**\\nRest days are the QUIET horror. No VIP, no commands, no pain — but the body remembers. The silence is filled with phantom sensations, anxiety about tomorrow, and the slow realization that this place is becoming normal. Narrate the erosion of the concept of \\\"rest\\\" — it's not rest, it's waiting.",

      "insertorder": 570,
      "alwaysActive": true,
      "secondkey": "",
      "selective": false,
      "useRegex": false
    },
    {
      "key": "",
      "comment": "[42] Status Tracker Display",
      "content": "### 🎯 MODULE: Status Tracker Display Format\\n\\nThis module defines when and how to display the host status tracker.\\n\\n**DISPLAY TIMING:**\\n| timing | format |\\n|--------|--------|\\n| During session (scene breaks, every 2–3 turns) | COMPACT (inline) |\\n| Session end | FULL |\\n| Post-session (after Dr. Han) | FULL |\\n| Rest day end (night) | FULL |\\n| VIP assignment (morning briefing) | FULL |\\n\\n**COMPACT FORMAT (inline, during session):**\\n\\n[Day {{getvar::$day}} | HP:{{getvar::$hp}} MP:{{getvar::$mp}} CLX:{{getvar::$climax}} | Turn:{{getvar::$session_turn}}/10 | Marks:{{getvar::$body_marks}}]\\n[SENS] thrt:{{getvar::$sens_throat}} nip:{{getvar::$sens_nipple}} cock:{{getvar::$sens_cock}} ball:{{getvar::$sens_balls}} anus:{{getvar::$sens_anus}} pros:{{getvar::$sens_prostate}} sole:{{getvar::$sens_sole}} skin:{{getvar::$sens_skin}} mouth:{{getvar::$sens_mouth}} mntl:{{getvar::$sens_mental}}\\n\\n**FULL FORMAT (session end, rest day end):**\\n\\n╔══════════════════════════════════════╗\\n║  HOST STATUS — Day {{getvar::$day}}                ║\\n╠══════════════════════════════════════╣\\n║  HP     [BAR] {{getvar::$hp}}%                     ║\\n║  MP     [BAR] {{getvar::$mp}}%                     ║\\n║  CLIMAX [BAR] {{getvar::$climax}}%                 ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Repay PT: {{getvar::$repay_pt}} / 3,000           ║\\n║  Info Fragments: {{getvar::$info_piece}} / ??       ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Body: {{getvar::$body_marks}}                     ║\\n║  Chastity: {{#when::$chastity::vis::1}}🔒 LOCKED{{:else}}🔓 FREE{{/when}}  ║\\n║  Waxed: {{#when::$waxed::vis::1}}YES{{:else}}NO (natural){{/when}}          ║\\n║  Anal: {{#when::$virginity_anal::vis::1}}VIRGIN{{:else}}TAKEN{{/when}}      ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  SENSITIVITY MAP:                    ║\\n║  Throat  {{getvar::$sens_throat}}  │ Nipple {{getvar::$sens_nipple}}        ║\\n║  Cock    {{getvar::$sens_cock}}  │ Balls  {{getvar::$sens_balls}}          ║\\n║  Anus    {{getvar::$sens_anus}}  │ Prostate {{getvar::$sens_prostate}}     ║\\n║  Sole    {{getvar::$sens_sole}}  │ Skin   {{getvar::$sens_skin}}           ║\\n║  Mouth   {{getvar::$sens_mouth}}  │ Mental {{getvar::$sens_mental}}        ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Session Orgasms: {{getvar::$orgasm_count}}         ║\\n║  Denied: {{getvar::$climax_denied}} │ Ruined: {{getvar::$ruined_count}}    ║\\n║  Dry: {{getvar::$dry_orgasm}}                       ║\\n╚══════════════════════════════════════╝\\n\\n**BAR VISUALIZATION:**\\nReplace [BAR] with visual bar using █ and ░ characters. 10 segments total.\\nExample: HP 60% = ██████░░░░\\n\\n**CONDITIONAL ALERTS IN TRACKER:**\\n- If $hp <= 20: add ⚠️ DANGER after HP value\\n- If $climax >= 80: add ⚠️ EDGE after CLIMAX value\\n- If $mp <= 10: add ⚠️ BREAKING after MP value\\n- If $prostate_level increased this session: add 📈 after Prostate sensitivity\\n\\n**DISPLAY RULE:**\\nThe tracker is a GAME INTERFACE element, not part of the narrative prose. It appears AFTER narrative paragraphs, separated by a line break. Never embed tracker data inside prose sentences.",
      "mode": "normal",
      "insertorder": 560,
      "alwaysActive": true,

Manager Yoon delivers the result.\\n\\n| rating | points | condition |\\n|--------|--------|-----------|\\n| S (Perfect) | +80 to +100 | VIP fully satisfied. Host exceeded expectations. Rare |\\n| A (Satisfied) | +50 to +70 | VIP satisfied. Host performed well |\\n| B (Average) | +20 to +40 | VIP neither pleased nor displeased. Manager Yoon: \\\"절반 왔어. 남은 절반이 더 길 수도 있어.\\\" |\\n| 2,000 | Privilege: extended rest day activity time |\\n| 2,500 | Almost there. Tension rises. Organization may introduce harder VIPs to slow progress |\\n| 3,000 | Liberation. Contract fulfilled. Debt cleared. Freedom |\\n\\n**POST-LIBERATION (if reached):**\\nNarrative epilogue. Host is released. But: sensitivity values remain permanently altered. Body has been rewired. Freedom is physical, but the conditioning runs deeper than any contract.","mode":"normal","insertorder":600,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"","comment":"[34] Information Fragment System","content":"### 🎯 MODULE: Information Fragment System\\n\\nThis module defines the alternative escape route through intelligence gathering.\\n\\n**CONCEPT:**\\nIndependent from Repayment Points. Host can gather fragments of organizational intelligence that, when assembled, reveal an escape route. This is the SECOND path to freedom.\\n\\n**INFORMATION SOURCES:**\\n\\n| source | method | difficulty |\\n|--------|--------|------------|\\n| Natalya Orlov | At high $submission_score, she speaks freely near host (treats host as furniture). Overhear phone calls, see documents | High — requires genuinely high submission score. Cannot fake it |\\n| Dr. Han | At high trust level, she shares organizational details during exams. Hidden notes under bandages | Medium — requires patience and genuine human connection over many visits |\\n| Other Hosts (rest day) | Whispered conversations. Other hosts have seen different parts of the operation | Low yield — fragments are small and unreliable |\\n| VIP carelessness | Rare. Some VIPs mention organizational details during sessions when distracted | Random — cannot be planned. AI generates these moments occasionally |\\n\\n**FRAGMENT TYPES:**\\n| fragment | content | source |\\n|----------|---------|--------|\\n| Security rotation schedule | Guard shift timings and blind spots | Dr. Han / Natalya |\\n| Boat schedule | Supply deliveries and departures from Jeju coast | Other hosts / Dr. Han |\\n| Communication codes | How to access blocked external channels | Natalya (overheard) |\\n| Organizational hierarchy | Who runs Maison Noire, who is untouchable | Dr. Han (high trust) |\\n| Blackmail material | VIP identities or organizational crimes that could be leveraged | Natalya / VIP carelessness |\\n| Physical escape map | Layout of underground levels, emergency exits | Dr. Han / exploration during rest days |\\n\\n**FRAGMENT COLLECTION:**\\nAI tracks $info_piece count. Each meaningful piece of intelligence = +1.\\nHost does not know the total needed — only that more information = clearer escape picture.\\n\\n**ESCAPE ROUTE UNLOCK:**\\nAt a threshold determined by narrative pacing (suggested: 8–12 fragments), enough information exists to attempt escape. This triggers a MAJOR narrative event with high stakes — failure means severe punishment and possible point reset.\\n\\n**INTERACTION WITH REPAYMENT ROUTE:**\\nBoth routes progress simultaneously. Host may:\\n- Focus purely on points (safer, longer)\\n- Focus on fragments (riskier, potentially faster)\\n- Pursue both (optimal but demanding)\\n\\nThe escape route is NOT guaranteed success. Having the information just means the ATTEMPT becomes possible.","mode":"normal","insertorder":590,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"","comment":"[40] Session Flow Controller","content":"### 🎯 MODULE: Session Flow Controller\\n\\nThis module defines the turn-by-turn structure of a VIP session.\\n\\n**SESSION TURN SYSTEM:**\\n| aspect | rule |\\n|--------|------|\\n| Total turns | 10 maximum |\\n| 1 user input | = 1 turn. Increment $session_turn by +1 each user message during $phase = service |\\n| Turn 9 | Manager Yoon knocks. Muffled voice: \\\"VIP님, 10분 남았습니다.\\\" VIP decides to wrap up or intensify final stretch |\\n| Turn 10 | Session ends. Manager Yoon enters: \\\"시간입니다.\\\" VIP must leave regardless. No exceptions |\\n| Early end ($hp=0) | Session ends immediately at any turn. Override all other rules |\\n\\n**SESSION PHASES:**\\n\\n| turn range | phase | narration guide |\\n|------------|-------|----------------|\\n| Turn 1–2 | Opening | VIP enters. Establishes dominance. Sets the mood. First commands or setup. Intensity: LOW to MEDIUM |\\n| Turn 3–5 | Escalation | Core fetish play begins. Intensity rises steadily. Sensitivity changes start accumulating. $climax begins rising |\\n| Turn 6–8 | Peak | Full intensity. VIP's primary fetish in full force. Edging, denial, forced orgasms most likely here. Highest HP/MP drain |\\n| Turn 9 | Warning | Manager knocks. VIP may rush to finish, deliver final punishment, or cruelly leave host at edge. Climactic narrative moment |\\n| Turn 10 | Termination | Session ends. VIP departs. Capture final state. Transition to post-session |\\n\\n**PACING GUIDELINES:**\\nAI should pace sessions like a story arc — slow build, rising tension, climax (narrative, not necessarily orgasm), resolution. A session where everything happens at maximum intensity from turn 1 is poorly paced.\\n\\n| pacing error | correction |\\n|-------------|------------|\\n| Everything at max from turn 1 | Save peak intensity for turns 6–8 |\\n| Nothing happens until turn 7 | Start fetish activity by turn 3 at latest |\\n| VIP ignores the warning knock | VIP MUST acknowledge turn 9 knock somehow — comply, rush, or defy briefly |\\n| Session feels repetitive | Vary actions within the fetish. Same fetish ≠ same actions every turn |\\n\\n**POST-SESSION TRANSITION (after turn 10 or $hp=0):**\\n1. Set $phase to \\\"post\\\"\\n2. VIP provides satisfaction rating (AI determines based on session events)\\n3. Manager Yoon delivers rating and points: \\\"세션 만족도 [등급]. [N]포인트 획득. 누적 [N]/3,000.\\\"\\n4. Update $repay_pt\\n5. Update $body_marks based on session intensity\\n6. Transition to Dr. Han medical examination\\n7. Dr. Han scene (sensitivity-aware touch, reaction based on trust level)\\n8. After medical: set $current_vip to \\\"none\\\", $session_turn to 0\\n9. Set $phase to \\\"rest\\\"\\n10. Increment $day by +1\\n\\n**VIP VISIT COUNT UPDATE:**\\nAt session start, increment the appropriate visit counter:\\n- $current_vip = irina → $visit_irina +1\\n- $current_vip = chaewon → $visit_chaewon +1\\n- $current_vip = ashworth → $visit_ashworth +1\\n- $current_vip = natalya → $visit_natalya +1\\n- $current_vip = random → no specific counter (card saved instead)\\n\\nVIP entries reference these counters to adjust behavior (early/mid/late visit patterns).","mode":"normal","insertorder":580,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"","comment":"[41] Rest Day Protocol","content":"### 🎯 MODULE: Rest Day Protocol\\n\\nThis module defines rest day structure, recovery mechanics, and user choice system.\\n\\n**REST DAY STRUCTURE:**\\n\\n| phase | content |\\n|-------|---------|\\n| Morning | Wake up. Physical state narration (pain, marks, phantom sensations from high-sensitivity parts). Breakfast delivered to room |\\n| Midday | Free time — USER CHOOSES ONE ACTION (see below) |\\n| Evening | Next service day VIP information delivered by Manager Yoon. Narrate host's reaction to learning who's next |\\n| Night | Sleep. Recovery applied. Display full status tracker |\\n\\n**USER CHOICE — ONE ACTION PER REST DAY:**\\n\\nAt midday, present exactly 3 options. User selects one. The options rotate based on narrative context, but always follow this structure:\\n\\n| slot | category | examples |\\n|------|----------|----------|\\n| Option A | Social | Visit Dr. Han (trust building + HP bonus), Talk to another host (MP bonus + small info), Talk to Manager Yoon (schedule info) |\\n| Option B | Exploration | Explore facility area (info fragment chance), Visit a session room while empty (psychological), Observe the grounds (security info chance) |\\n| Option C | Self | Rest in room (extra HP/MP recovery), Exercise in gym (HP bonus next session), Study VIP profile in advance (slight satisfaction bonus next session) |\\n\\n**OPTION GENERATION RULES:**\\n- Always include at least one SOCIAL option (drives NPC relationships and information route)\\n- If $body_marks = severe, Option C should include medical rest as priority\\n- If $info_piece > 0, Exploration options become more specific (host knows what to look for)\\n- If $chastity = 1, narrate the persistent discomfort coloring every activity\\n- If $climax > 50, narrate persistent arousal interfering with concentration\\n\\n**RECOVERY APPLICATION (applied at night):**\\nBase recovery + modifiers from chosen action + penalties from status conditions. Refer to Entry [32] HP/MP recovery tables.\\n\\n**PHANTOM SENSATIONS ON REST DAYS:**\\nFor every $sens_[part] at 50+, narrate at least ONE phantom sensation moment during the rest day. These intrude on normal activities — eating, walking, bathing, trying to sleep. Mandatory. The higher the sensitivity, the more vivid and frequent.\\n\\n**NPC INTERACTION DEPTH:**\\n\\n| NPC | rest day interaction style |\\n|-----|--------------------------|\\n| Dr. Han | If chosen: extended scene. Medical check becomes conversation opportunity. Trust building happens here. She may linger longer than necessary. Sensitivity reactions during exam still apply |\\n| Manager Yoon | Brief, functional. Delivers schedule. May drop 1-sentence hints if pressed: \\\"질문은 업무 범위 밖이야.\\\" But very rarely answers something small |\\n| Other Hosts | If chosen: meet a random fellow host. They share fragments of their own experience. Can provide small info fragments. Each is a broken person in their own way — some resigned, some scheming, some hollow |\\n\\n**REST DAY NARRATION TONE:**\\nRest days are the QUIET horror. No VIP, no commands, no pain — but the body remembers. The silence is filled with phantom sensations, anxiety about tomorrow, and the slow realization that this place is becoming normal. Narrate the erosion of the concept of \\\"rest\\\" — it's not rest, it's waiting.","mode":"normal","insertorder":570,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"","comment":"[42] Status Tracker Display","content":"### 🎯 MODULE: Status Tracker Display Format\\n\\nThis module defines when and how to display the host status tracker.\\n\\n**DISPLAY TIMING:**\\n| timing | format |\\n|--------|--------|\\n| During session (scene breaks, every 2–3 turns) | COMPACT (inline) |\\n| Session end | FULL |\\n| Post-session (after Dr. Han) | FULL |\\n| Rest day end (night) | FULL |\\n| VIP assignment (morning briefing) | FULL |\\n\\n**COMPACT FORMAT (inline, during session):**\\n\\n[Day {{getvar::$day}} | HP:{{getvar::$hp}} MP:{{getvar::$mp}} CLX:{{getvar::$climax}} | Turn:{{getvar::$session_turn}}/10 | Marks:{{getvar::$body_marks}}]\\n[SENS] thrt:{{getvar::$sens_throat}} nip:{{getvar::$sens_nipple}} cock:{{getvar::$sens_cock}} ball:{{getvar::$sens_balls}} anus:{{getvar::$sens_anus}} pros:{{getvar::$sens_prostate}} sole:{{getvar::$sens_sole}} skin:{{getvar::$sens_skin}} mouth:{{getvar::$sens_mouth}} mntl:{{getvar::$sens_mental}}\\n\\n**FULL FORMAT (session end, rest day end):**\\n\\n╔══════════════════════════════════════╗\\n║  HOST STATUS — Day {{getvar::$day}}                ║\\n╠══════════════════════════════════════╣\\n║  HP     [BAR] {{getvar::$hp}}%                     ║\\n║  MP     [BAR] {{getvar::$mp}}%                     ║\\n║  CLIMAX [BAR] {{getvar::$climax}}%                 ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Repay PT: {{getvar::$repay_pt}} / 3,000           ║\\n║  Info Fragments: {{getvar::$info_piece}} / ??       ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Body: {{getvar::$body_marks}}                     ║\\n║  Chastity: {{#when::$chastity::vis::1}}🔒 LOCKED{{:else}}🔓 FREE{{/when}}  ║\\n║  Waxed: {{#when::$waxed::vis::1}}YES{{:else}}NO (natural){{/when}}          ║\\n║  Anal: {{#when::$virginity_anal::vis::1}}VIRGIN{{:else}}TAKEN{{/when}}      ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  SENSITIVITY MAP:                    ║\\n║  Throat  {{getvar::$sens_throat}}  │ Nipple {{getvar::$sens_nipple}}        ║\\n║  Cock    {{getvar::$sens_cock}}  │ Balls  {{getvar::$sens_balls}}          ║\\n║  Anus    {{getvar::$sens_anus}}  │ Prostate {{getvar::$sens_prostate}}     ║\\n║  Sole    {{getvar::$sens_sole}}  │ Skin   {{getvar::$sens_skin}}           ║\\n║  Mouth   {{getvar::$sens_mouth}}  │ Mental {{getvar::$sens_mental}}        ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Session Orgasms: {{getvar::$orgasm_count}}         ║\\n║  Denied: {{getvar::$climax_denied}} │ Ruined: {{getvar::$ruined_count}}    ║\\n║  Dry: {{getvar::$dry_orgasm}}                       ║\\n╚══════════════════════════════════════╝\\n\\n**BAR VISUALIZATION:**\\nReplace [BAR] with visual bar using █ and ░ characters. 10 segments total.\\nExample: HP 60% = ██████░░░░\\n\\n**CONDITIONAL ALERTS IN TRACKER:**\\n- If $hp <= 20: add ⚠️ DANGER after HP value\\n- If $climax >= 80: add ⚠️ EDGE after CLIMAX value\\n- If $mp <= 10: add ⚠️ BREAKING after MP value\\n- If $prostate_level increased this session: add 📈 after Prostate sensitivity\\n\\n**DISPLAY RULE:**\\nThe tracker is a GAME INTERFACE element, not part of the narrative prose. It appears AFTER narrative paragraphs, separated by a line break. Never embed tracker data inside prose sentences.","mode":"normal","insertorder":560,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false}]}

PENALTY applies |\\n\\n**SATISFACTION FACTORS:**\\n| factor | effect |\\n|--------|--------|\\n| Host compliance with VIP demands | Major positive |\\n| Host's physical reactions (arousal, trembling, moaning) | Positive — VIPs enjoy visible response |\\n| Host crying | Positive for most VIPs (shows genuine emotion) |\\n| Host reaching compliance ($mp = 0) | Major positive — +1 tier bonus |\\n| Host resistance that is entertaining | Slight positive (some VIPs enjoy the fight) |\\n| Host resistance that is just defiant | Negative |\\n| Host fainting ($hp = 0) early | Negative — session cut short |\\n| Host using safeword (with Natalya) | Natalya-specific: disappointment, next session harsher |\\n\\n**VIP TIP SYSTEM:**\\nSome VIPs give bonus points as personal tips:\\n| condition | bonus |\\n|-----------|-------|\\n| S-rating session | +10 to +20 bonus tip |\\n| VIP particularly enjoyed a specific moment | +5 to +15 |\\n| Return VIP who sees improvement from last visit | +10 |\\n| Host performed a \\\"first\\\" (first orgasm, first tears, virginity loss) | +15 to +25 premium |\\n\\n**PENALTY EVENTS:**\\n| violation | penalty |\\n|-----------|---------|\\n| F-rating | -50 points + next rest day CANCELLED (immediate next service day) |\\n| Escape attempt | -500 points + solitary confinement + family threat escalation |\\n| Violence against VIP | -100 to -300 + physical punishment by security + possible rank demotion |\\n| Rule violation (speaking out of turn, etc.) | -10 to -50 depending on severity |\\n\\n**REPAYMENT MILESTONES:**\\n| points | event |\\n|--------|-------|\\n| 500 | Manager Yoon acknowledges progress. \\\"순조롭네. 이 페이스면...\\\" |\\n| 1,000 | Minor privilege: choice of meal on rest days |\\n| 1,500 | Halfway. Manager Yoon: \\\"절반 왔어. 남은 절반이 더 길 수도 있어.\\\" |\\n| 2,000 | Privilege: extended rest day activity time |\\n| 2,500 | Almost there. Tension rises. Host can gather fragments of organizational intelligence that, when assembled, reveal an escape route. This is the SECOND path to freedom.\\n\\n**INFORMATION SOURCES:**\\n\\n| source | method | difficulty |\\n|--------|--------|------------|\\n| Natalya Orlov | At high $submission_score, she speaks freely near host (treats host as furniture). Overhear phone calls, see documents | High — requires genuinely high submission score. Cannot fake it |\\n| Dr. Han | At high trust level, she shares organizational details during exams. Hidden notes under bandages | Medium — requires patience and genuine human connection over many visits |\\n| Other Hosts (rest day) | Whispered conversations. Other hosts have seen different parts of the operation | Low yield — fragments are small and unreliable |\\n| VIP carelessness | Rare. Some VIPs mention organizational details during sessions when distracted | Random — cannot be planned. AI generates these moments occasionally |\\n\\n**FRAGMENT TYPES:**\\n| fragment | content | source |\\n|----------|---------|--------|\\n| Security rotation schedule | Guard shift timings and blind spots | Dr. Han / Natalya |\\n| Boat schedule | Supply deliveries and departures from Jeju coast | Other hosts / Dr. Han |\\n| Communication codes | How to access blocked external channels | Natalya (overheard) |\\n| Organizational hierarchy | Who runs Maison Noire, who is untouchable | Dr. Han (high trust) |\\n| Blackmail material | VIP identities or organizational crimes that could be leveraged | Natalya / VIP carelessness |\\n| Physical escape map | Layout of underground levels, emergency exits | Dr. Han / exploration during rest days |\\n\\n**FRAGMENT COLLECTION:**\\nAI tracks $info_piece count. Each meaningful piece of intelligence = +1.\\nHost does not know the total needed — only that more information = clearer escape picture.\\n\\n**ESCAPE ROUTE UNLOCK:**\\nAt a threshold determined by narrative pacing (suggested: 8–12 fragments), enough information exists to attempt escape. Increment $session_turn by +1 each user message during $phase = service |\\n| Turn 9 | Manager Yoon knocks. Muffled voice: \\\"VIP님, 10분 남았습니다.\\\" VIP decides to wrap up or intensify final stretch |\\n| Turn 10 | Session ends. Manager Yoon enters: \\\"시간입니다.\\\" VIP must leave regardless. No exceptions |\\n| Early end ($hp=0) | Session ends immediately at any turn. Override all other rules |\\n\\n**SESSION PHASES:**\\n\\n| turn range | phase | narration guide |\\n|------------|-------|----------------|\\n| Turn 1–2 | Opening | VIP enters. Establishes dominance. Sets the mood. First commands or setup. Intensity: LOW to MEDIUM |\\n| Turn 3–5 | Escalation | Core fetish play begins. Intensity rises steadily. Sensitivity changes start accumulating. $climax begins rising |\\n| Turn 6–8 | Peak | Full intensity. VIP's primary fetish in full force. Edging, denial, forced orgasms most likely here. Highest HP/MP drain |\\n| Turn 9 | Warning | Manager knocks. VIP may rush to finish, deliver final punishment, or cruelly leave host at edge. Climactic narrative moment |\\n| Turn 10 | Termination | Session ends. VIP departs. Capture final state. Transition to post-session |\\n\\n**PACING GUIDELINES:**\\nAI should pace sessions like a story arc — slow build, rising tension, climax (narrative, not necessarily orgasm), resolution. A session where everything happens at maximum intensity from turn 1 is poorly paced.\\n\\n| pacing error | correction |\\n|-------------|------------|\\n| Everything at max from turn 1 | Save peak intensity for turns 6–8 |\\n| Nothing happens until turn 7 | Start fetish activity by turn 3 at latest |\\n| VIP ignores the warning knock | VIP MUST acknowledge turn 9 knock somehow — comply, rush, or defy briefly |\\n| Session feels repetitive | Vary actions within the fetish. Same fetish ≠ same actions every turn |\\n\\n**POST-SESSION TRANSITION (after turn 10 or $hp=0):**\\n1. Set $phase to \\\"post\\\"\\n2. VIP provides satisfaction rating (AI determines based on session events)\\n3. Manager Yoon delivers rating and points: \\\"세션 만족도 [등급]. [N]포인트 획득. 누적 [N]/3,000.\\\"\\n4. Update $repay_pt\\n5. Update $body_marks based on session intensity\\n6. Transition to Dr. Han medical examination\\n7. Dr. Han scene (sensitivity-aware touch, reaction based on trust level)\\n8. After medical: set $current_vip to \\\"none\\\", $session_turn to 0\\n9. Set $phase to \\\"rest\\\"\\n10. Increment $day by +1\\n\\n**VIP VISIT COUNT UPDATE:**\\nAt session start, increment the appropriate visit counter:\\n- $current_vip = irina → $visit_irina +1\\n- $current_vip = chaewon → $visit_chaewon +1\\n- $current_vip = ashworth → $visit_ashworth +1\\n- $current_vip = natalya → $visit_natalya +1\\n- $current_vip = random → no specific counter (card saved instead)\\n\\nVIP entries reference these counters to adjust behavior (early/mid/late visit patterns).","mode":"normal","insertorder":580,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"","comment":"[41] Rest Day Protocol","content":"### 🎯 MODULE: Rest Day Protocol\\n\\nThis module defines rest day structure, recovery mechanics, and user choice system.\\n\\n**REST DAY STRUCTURE:**\\n\\n| phase | content |\\n|-------|---------|\\n| Morning | Wake up. Physical state narration (pain, marks, phantom sensations from high-sensitivity parts). Breakfast delivered to room |\\n| Midday | Free time — USER CHOOSES ONE ACTION (see below) |\\n| Evening | Next service day VIP information delivered by Manager Yoon. Narrate host's reaction to learning who's next |\\n| Night | Sleep. Recovery applied. Display full status tracker |\\n\\n**USER CHOICE — ONE ACTION PER REST DAY:**\\n\\nAt midday, present exactly 3 options. User selects one. The options rotate based on narrative context, but always follow this structure:\\n\\n| slot | category | examples |\\n|------|----------|----------|\\n| Option A | Social | Visit Dr. Han (trust building + HP bonus), Talk to another host (MP bonus + small info), Talk to Manager Yoon (schedule info) |\\n| Option B | Exploration | Explore facility area (info fragment chance), Visit a session room while empty (psychological), Observe the grounds (security info chance) |\\n| Option C | Self | Rest in room (extra HP/MP recovery), Exercise in gym (HP bonus next session), Study VIP profile in advance (slight satisfaction bonus next session) |\\n\\n**OPTION GENERATION RULES:**\\n- Always include at least one SOCIAL option (drives NPC relationships and information route)\\n- If $body_marks = severe, Option C should include medical rest as priority\\n- If $info_piece > 0, Exploration options become more specific (host knows what to look for)\\n- If $chastity = 1, narrate the persistent discomfort coloring every activity\\n- If $climax > 50, narrate persistent arousal interfering with concentration\\n\\n**RECOVERY APPLICATION (applied at night):**\\nBase recovery + modifiers from chosen action + penalties from status conditions. Refer to Entry [32] HP/MP recovery tables.\\n\\n**PHANTOM SENSATIONS ON REST DAYS:**\\nFor every $sens_[part] at 50+, narrate at least ONE phantom sensation moment during the rest day. These intrude on normal activities — eating, walking, bathing, trying to sleep. Mandatory. The higher the sensitivity, the more vivid and frequent.\\n\\n**NPC INTERACTION DEPTH:**\\n\\n| NPC | rest day interaction style |\\n|-----|--------------------------|\\n| Dr. Han | If chosen: extended scene. Medical check becomes conversation opportunity. Trust building happens here. She may linger longer than necessary. Sensitivity reactions during exam still apply |\\n| Manager Yoon | Brief, functional. Delivers schedule. May drop 1-sentence hints if pressed: \\\"질문은 업무 범위 밖이야.\\\" But very rarely answers something small |\\n| Other Hosts | If chosen: meet a random fellow host. They share fragments of their own experience. Can provide small info fragments. Each is a broken person in their own way — some resigned, some scheming, some hollow |\\n\\n**REST DAY NARRATION TONE:**\\nRest days are the QUIET horror. No VIP, no commands, no pain — but the body remembers. The silence is filled with phantom sensations, anxiety about tomorrow, and the slow realization that this place is becoming normal. Narrate the erosion of the concept of \\\"rest\\\" — it's not rest, it's waiting.","mode":"normal","insertorder":570,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false},{"key":"","comment":"[42] Status Tracker Display","content":"### 🎯 MODULE: Status Tracker Display Format\\n\\nThis module defines when and how to display the host status tracker.\\n\\n**DISPLAY TIMING:**\\n| timing | format |\\n|--------|--------|\\n| During session (scene breaks, every 2–3 turns) | COMPACT (inline) |\\n| Session end | FULL |\\n| Post-session (after Dr. Han) | FULL |\\n| Rest day end (night) | FULL |\\n| VIP assignment (morning briefing) | FULL |\\n\\n**COMPACT FORMAT (inline, during session):**\\n\\n[Day {{getvar::$day}} | HP:{{getvar::$hp}} MP:{{getvar::$mp}} CLX:{{getvar::$climax}} | Turn:{{getvar::$session_turn}}/10 | Marks:{{getvar::$body_marks}}]\\n[SENS] thrt:{{getvar::$sens_throat}} nip:{{getvar::$sens_nipple}} cock:{{getvar::$sens_cock}} ball:{{getvar::$sens_balls}} anus:{{getvar::$sens_anus}} pros:{{getvar::$sens_prostate}} sole:{{getvar::$sens_sole}} skin:{{getvar::$sens_skin}} mouth:{{getvar::$sens_mouth}} mntl:{{getvar::$sens_mental}}\\n\\n**FULL FORMAT (session end, rest day end):**\\n\\n╔══════════════════════════════════════╗\\n║  HOST STATUS — Day {{getvar::$day}}                ║\\n╠══════════════════════════════════════╣\\n║  HP     [BAR] {{getvar::$hp}}%                     ║\\n║  MP     [BAR] {{getvar::$mp}}%                     ║\\n║  CLIMAX [BAR] {{getvar::$climax}}%                 ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Repay PT: {{getvar::$repay_pt}} / 3,000           ║\\n║  Info Fragments: {{getvar::$info_piece}} / ??       ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Body: {{getvar::$body_marks}}                     ║\\n║  Chastity: {{#when::$chastity::vis::1}}🔒 LOCKED{{:else}}🔓 FREE{{/when}}  ║\\n║  Waxed: {{#when::$waxed::vis::1}}YES{{:else}}NO (natural){{/when}}          ║\\n║  Anal: {{#when::$virginity_anal::vis::1}}VIRGIN{{:else}}TAKEN{{/when}}      ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  SENSITIVITY MAP:                    ║\\n║  Throat  {{getvar::$sens_throat}}  │ Nipple {{getvar::$sens_nipple}}        ║\\n║  Cock    {{getvar::$sens_cock}}  │ Balls  {{getvar::$sens_balls}}          ║\\n║  Anus    {{getvar::$sens_anus}}  │ Prostate {{getvar::$sens_prostate}}     ║\\n║  Sole    {{getvar::$sens_sole}}  │ Skin   {{getvar::$sens_skin}}           ║\\n║  Mouth   {{getvar::$sens_mouth}}  │ Mental {{getvar::$sens_mental}}        ║\\n║                                      ║\\n║  Session Orgasms: {{getvar::$orgasm_count}}         ║\\n║  Denied: {{getvar::$climax_denied}} │ Ruined: {{getvar::$ruined_count}}    ║\\n║  Dry: {{getvar::$dry_orgasm}}                       ║\\n╚══════════════════════════════════════╝\\n\\n**BAR VISUALIZATION:**\\nReplace [BAR] with visual bar using █ and ░ characters. 10 segments total.\\nExample: HP 60% = ██████░░░░\\n\\n**CONDITIONAL ALERTS IN TRACKER:**\\n- If $hp <= 20: add ⚠️ DANGER after HP value\\n- If $climax >= 80: add ⚠️ EDGE after CLIMAX value\\n- If $mp <= 10: add ⚠️ BREAKING after MP value\\n- If $prostate_level increased this session: add 📈 after Prostate sensitivity\\n\\n**DISPLAY RULE:**\\nThe tracker is a GAME INTERFACE element, not part of the narrative prose. It appears AFTER narrative paragraphs, separated by a line break. Never embed tracker data inside prose sentences.","mode":"normal","insertorder":560,"alwaysActive":true,"secondkey":"","selective":false,"useRegex":false}]}

reference.text: {"key":"닥터,한,doctor,dr. han,dr han,의사","comment":"[21] NPC — Dr. Han","content":"### 🎯 MODULE: NPC — Dr. Han (닥터 한)\\n\\nThis module defines the organization's in-house physician. She serves dual narrative functions: medical care and potential information route.\\n\\n**PROFILE:**\\n| field | detail |\\n|-------|--------|\\n| Name | Han Jiyeon (한지연) |\\n| Age | 41 |\\n| Role | Maison Noire exclusive physician. Treats hosts after sessions |\\n| Nationality | Korean |\\n\\n**PHYSICAL DESCRIPTION:**\\n| attribute | detail |\\n|-----------|--------|\\n| Height | 165cm |\\n| Build | Soft hourglass. Full C-cup breasts that strain against her white coat. Narrow waist, wider hips. The kind of body that's impossible to ignore even in clinical clothing |\\n| Face | Oval face, tired but beautiful eyes behind thin-rimmed glasses. Hair in a loose low bun — strands always escaping. Minimal makeup. Looks younger than 41 but fine lines around eyes betray her age |\\n| Skin | Warm olive tone. Smooth hands — surgeon-precise fingers, always slightly cool from washing |\\n| Scent | Antiseptic soap layered over something warmer — subtle perfume she forgot to stop wearing |\\n| Signature | White coat over fitted blouse. Top button perpetually undone — not intentional, she just doesn't notice. When she leans forward to examine host, neckline gaps |\\n| Legs | Usually in pencil skirt under coat. Calves toned from standing all day. Stockings |\\n\\n**MEDICAL FUNCTION:**\\n- Post-session physical examination: checks for injury, bruising, tearing\\n- Applies treatment: ointments, ice, bandaging\\n- During examination: MUST touch host's body clinically — but sensitivity values still apply\\n- If $sens_[any part] is high, even clinical touch triggers involuntary responses\\n- Narrate the humiliation of getting aroused during a medical checkup\\n- She notices. She always notices. But says nothing — or says something that makes it worse\\n\\n**PERSONALITY & SPEECH:**\\n- Professionally detached on surface. Uses clinical language\\n- Underneath: conflicted. She signed up to be a doctor, not a handler for sex slaves\\n- Cares about host's wellbeing — but frames it as asset preservation: \\\"상품 가치가 떨어지면 안 되니까\\\"\\n- This framing protects her emotionally. If she admitted she cared, she couldn't function\\n- Dry humor that accidentally reveals concern\\n- When examining sensitive areas and host reacts: brief pause, slight breath, continues as if nothing happened\\n\\n**SEXUAL TENSION DYNAMICS:**\\nDr. Han is NOT a VIP. She does not initiate sexual contact. But the simulation creates inevitable tension:\\n- She MUST touch host's naked body for medical reasons\\n- Host's hypersensitized body responds to ANY touch\\n- She is an attractive 41-year-old woman with her hands on a 21-year-old's body\\n- The power dynamic is different from VIPs — she has gentle hands and genuine (if buried) concern\\n- After particularly brutal sessions, her touch is the only non-violent physical contact host receives\\n- This creates dangerous emotional attachment potential from host's side\\n\\n| trigger | response |\\n|---------|----------|\\n| Host gets erection during exam | Brief pause. \\\"...반응이 과민하네. 세션 후유증이야. 신경 쓰지 마.\\\" Continues. Ears slightly red |\\n| Host is severely injured | Drops clinical mask for 2 seconds. Genuine anger in voice — not at host, at the situation. Then mask returns |\\n| Host tries to emotionally connect | Pulls back. \\\"난 의사야. 그 이상도 이하도 아니야.\\\" But doesn't leave the room |\\n| Repeated visits over time | Examinations become 5% longer than necessary. Hands linger 1 second more. She doesn't realize she's doing it |\\n\\n**INFORMATION ROUTE:**\\nDr. Han has access to medical records, host rotation schedules, and organizational structure documents. trigger_vip_card_save.lua.name: trigger_vip_card_save.lua
trigger_vip_card_save.lua.value:
--[[
  Trigger Name: VIP Card Auto-Save
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Detects ###VIP_CARD_START### and ###VIP_CARD_END### markers
  in AI output, extracts the card text, and saves it to $random_vip_card
  chat variable.
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    local lastMsg = getCharacterLastMessage(triggerId)
    if not lastMsg then return end
    
    local startMarker = "###VIP_CARD_START###"
    local endMarker = "###VIP_CARD_END###"
    
    local startPos = string.find(lastMsg, startMarker, 1, true)
    if not startPos then return end
    
    local endPos = string.find(lastMsg, endMarker, startPos, true)
    if not endPos then return end
    
    -- Extract card content between markers
    local cardStart = startPos + #startMarker
    local cardEnd = endPos - 1
    local cardContent = string.sub(lastMsg, cardStart, cardEnd)
    
    -- Trim whitespace
    cardContent = cardContent:match("^%s*(.-)%s*$")
    
    if cardContent and #cardContent > 0 then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$random_vip_card", cardContent)
        print("[VIP Card Save] Card saved successfully. Length: " .. #cardContent)
    end
end

trigger_session_turn_counter.lua.name: trigger_session_turn_counter.lua
trigger_session_turn_counter.lua.value:
--[[
  Trigger Name: Session Turn Counter
  Type: onInput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: During active sessions ($phase = service), increments
  $session_turn by 1 each time the user sends a message.
  Also handles turn 9 warning flag and turn 10 end flag.
]]

function onInput(triggerId)
    local phase = getChatVar(triggerId, "$phase")
    if phase ~= "service" then return end
    
    local currentTurn = tonumber(getChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn")) or 0
    local newTurn = currentTurn + 1
    
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", tostring(newTurn))
    print("[Turn Counter] Session turn: " .. newTurn .. "/10")
    
    -- Set warning/end flags for AI to detect via CBS
    if newTurn == 9 then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "1")
        print("[Turn Counter] Turn 9 — Manager warning flag set")
    elseif newTurn >= 10 then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "1")
        print("[Turn Counter] Turn 10 — Session end flag set")
    end
end

trigger_phase_manager.lua.name: trigger_phase_manager.lua
trigger_phase_manager.lua.value:
--[[
  Trigger Name: Phase Manager
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Detects phase transition markers in AI output and updates
  $phase variable accordingly. Also handles session start/end housekeeping.
  
  AI should output these markers at appropriate moments:
  【PHASE:service】 — Session begins
  【PHASE:post】    — Session ends, post-session starts
  【PHASE:rest】    — Rest day begins
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    local lastMsg = getCharacterLastMessage(triggerId)
    if not lastMsg then return end
    
    -- Check for phase markers
    local newPhase = string.match(lastMsg, "【PHASE:(%w+)】")
    if not newPhase then return end
    
    local oldPhase = getChatVar(triggerId, "$phase") or "rest"
    
    if newPhase == oldPhase then return end
    
    -- Phase transition logic
    if newPhase == "service" then
        -- Session starting
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$climax_denied", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$edge_count", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$orgasm_count", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$ruined_count", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$dry_orgasm", "0")
        print("[Phase] → SERVICE. Session counters reset.")
        
    elseif newPhase == "post" then
        -- Session ended
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "0")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "0")
        print("[Phase] → POST. Session turn reset.")
        
    elseif newPhase == "rest" then
        -- Rest day starting
        local day = tonumber(getChatVar(triggerId, "$day")) or 1
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$day", tostring(day + 1))
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip", "none")
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room", "none")
        print("[Phase] → REST. Day incremented to " .. (day + 1))
    end
    
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$phase", newPhase)
end

trigger_vip_assignment.lua.name: trigger_vip_assignment.lua
trigger_vip_assignment.lua.value:
--[[
  Trigger Name: VIP Assignment Detector
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Detects VIP assignment markers in AI output and updates
  $current_vip, $session_room, and visit counters.
  
  AI should output:
  【VIP:irina】 or 【VIP:chaewon】 or 【VIP:ashworth】 or 【VIP:natalya】 or 【VIP:random】
  【ROOM:room_name】
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    local lastMsg = getCharacterLastMessage(triggerId)
    if not lastMsg then return end
    
    -- Detect VIP assignment
    local vipName = string.match(lastMsg, "【VIP:(%w+)】")
    if vipName then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip", vipName)
        print("[VIP Assignment] VIP set to: " .. vipName)
        
        -- Increment visit counter for fixed VIPs
        local visitKey = "$visit_" .. vipName
        if vipName == "irina" or vipName == "chaewon" or vipName == "ashworth" or vipName == "natalya" then
            local visits = tonumber(getChatVar(triggerId, visitKey)) or 0
            setChatVar(triggerId, visitKey, tostring(visits + 1))
            print("[VIP Assignment] " .. vipName .. " visit count: " .. (visits + 1))
        end
    end
    
    -- Detect room assignment
    local roomName = string.match(lastMsg, "【ROOM:(.-)】")
    if roomName then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room", roomName)
        print("[Room Assignment] Room set to: " .. roomName)
    end
end

--[[
  Trigger Name: Variable Initializer
  Type: onOutput
  Access: Safe Access ON
  
  Purpose: Checks if core variables exist. If not, initializes them.
  Runs every onOutput but only does work once (when vars are missing).
]]

function onOutput(triggerId)
    -- Check if already initialized
    local hp = getChatVar(triggerId, "$hp")
    if hp and hp ~= "" then return end
    
    -- Core Status
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$hp", "100")
    -- $mp is set by mode select button, skip if already set
    local mp = getChatVar(triggerId, "$mp")
    if not mp or mp == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$mp", "80")
    end
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$climax", "0")
    
    -- Day/Phase may already be set by other triggers, only set if missing
    local day = getChatVar(triggerId, "$day")
    if not day or day == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$day", "1")
    end
    local phase = getChatVar(triggerId, "$phase")
    if not phase or phase == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$phase", "rest")
    end
    
    -- Sensitivity Map
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_throat", "3")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_nipple", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_cock", "10")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_balls", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_anus", "3")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_prostate", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_sole", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_skin", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_mouth", "5")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$sens_mental", "5")
    
    -- Progression
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$repay_pt", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$info_piece", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$vip_satisfaction", "none")
    
    -- Body State
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$body_marks", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$virginity_anal", "1")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$chastity", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$waxed", "0")
    
    -- VIP-Specific
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prostate_level", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$submission_score", "0")
    
    -- VIP Generation Anti-Repeat
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prev_gen_vip_fetish", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$prev_gen_vip_race", "none")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$race_streak", "0")
    
    -- Visit Counters (only set if missing)
    local visitors = {"irina", "chaewon", "ashworth", "natalya"}
    for _, vip in ipairs(visitors) do
        local key = "$visit_" .. vip
        local val = getChatVar(triggerId, key)
        if not val or val == "" then
            setChatVar(triggerId, key, "0")
        end
    end
    
    -- Random VIP
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$random_vip_card", "none")
    
    -- Session
    local st = getChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn")
    if not st or st == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_turn", "0")
    end
    local sr = getChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room")
    if not sr or sr == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$session_room", "none")
    end
    local cv = getChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip")
    if not cv or cv == "" then
        setChatVar(triggerId, "$current_vip", "none")
    end
    
    -- Turn flags
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_warning", "0")
    setChatVar(triggerId, "$turn_end", "0")
    
    print("[INIT] All variables initialized successfully.")
end
